intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The biome is in a state of advanced degradation. The registry-defined specimens (P1-P4) are not visually present as healthy, identifiable plants. The environment is dominated by soil, debris, and a persistent white object (rabbit anchor).

inventory_reconciliation.P1_String_of_Nickels: Systemic Loss: No foliage detected in the yellow pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P2_Mexican_Mint: Systemic Loss: No foliage detected in the black pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P3_Pothos: Systemic Loss: The white rabbit anchor is present, but the Pothos specimen is absent.

plant_audit.P1_Yellow_Pot: Empty soil surface; no signs of life.
plant_audit.P2_Black_Pot: Empty soil surface; no signs of life.
plant_audit.P3_Black_Pot: Contains white rabbit anchor; soil appears undisturbed.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and damp across all containers.
biome_observations.debris: Presence of white, fragmented material (resembling crushed eggshells or mineral deposits) on the surface of the black pot.
biome_observations.desk_surface: A white cylindrical object (likely a container or tool) is present in the later images, acting as a new intervention.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t-5: Initial state shows bare soil with a single, thin, chlorotic sprout in the black pot.
temporal_deltas.t-5_to_t-2: The sprout observed in the earliest image has vanished or collapsed. The environment remains static and devoid of active vegetation.
temporal_deltas.t-2_to_current: Introduction of a white cylindrical object near the yellow pot. No vegetative recovery observed.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently non-viable. There is no evidence of photosynthetic activity or plant survival. The environment is essentially a collection of empty, soil-filled vessels.
anomalies: New Introduction: White cylindrical object (likely a bottle or container) placed near the yellow pot.
Debris: White particulate matter on the soil surface of the black pot, potentially indicating mineral buildup or intentional soil amendment.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a complete failure of the botanical registry. The pots are devoid of the expected specimens. The only biological activity noted was a brief, failed attempt at growth in the earliest image, which has since been lost. The environment is currently stagnant, with the only changes being the introduction of non-biological debris and objects.
